title: Paler Garden
description: Creaking buffs, infinite pale garden, shorter days, no sleeping and more. Recommended with dark shaders.
body:
This datapack changes the overworld into an endless Pale Garden biome, as well as buffing the new Creaking mob significantly. Days are far shorter than nights and you can no longer sleep through nights. The Nether has been infested by sculk, so you must be careful not to alert the Warden.

Recommended with very dark shaders for the best experience. (For example, BSL shaders with blocklight level at 0.30 intensity or below)
